name: genforge
description: GenForge evaluates public GitHub submissions with deterministic evidence collection and GenLayer-native adjudication.

scripts.lint:contract: python -X utf8 -m genvm_linter.cli check contracts/genforge_judge/review_submission.py && python -X utf8 -m genvm_linter.cli check contracts/genforge_judge/resolve_enterprise_dispute.py && python -X utf8 -m genvm_linter.cli check contracts/genforge_judge/deploy_project_token.py
